### Safety checks

- [x] Labels will be applied additively only.
- [x] No production, governed-field, sharing, source-of-truth, or external-system writes are requested without explicit approval.
- [x] Final report will include files changed, tests run, docs updated, unresolved blockers, handoff recommendations, and remaining risks.
